Uses of Package
neqsim.process.safety.dispersion

Packages that use neqsim.process.safety.dispersion
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.cfd
CFD source-term handoff schemas and exporters for safety dispersion studies.
neqsim.process.safety.dispersion
Gas dispersion and exposure screening models for process-safety consequence analysis.
neqsim.process.safety.qra
 
neqsim.process.safety.scenario
Automatic scenario generation for safety analysis.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.safety.dispersion used by neqsim.process.safety.cfd
    Class
    Description
    GasDispersionResult
    Result from a gas dispersion screening calculation.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.safety.dispersion used by neqsim.process.safety.dispersion
    Class
    Description
    GasDispersionAnalyzer
    High-level gas dispersion screening analyzer for NeqSim release scenarios.
    GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder
    Builder for GasDispersionAnalyzer.
    GasDispersionAnalyzer.ComponentData
    Component data used for toxic endpoint calculations.
    GasDispersionAnalyzer.FlammableEndpoint
    Flammable endpoint holder.
    GasDispersionAnalyzer.FuelData
    Fuel mixture data for flammable endpoint calculations.
    GasDispersionAnalyzer.ModelSelection
    Dispersion model selection mode.
    GasDispersionAnalyzer.ToxicEndpoint
    Toxic endpoint holder.
    GasDispersionResult
    Result from a gas dispersion screening calculation.
    GaussianPlume
    Pasquill–Gifford Gaussian plume dispersion model for neutral / passive gas releases.
    GaussianPlume.Stability
    Pasquill atmospheric stability classes.
    GaussianPlume.Terrain
    Terrain category for sigma correlation selection.
    HeavyGasDispersion
    Britter–McQuaid empirical correlation for continuous dense-gas (heavy) releases.
    ProbitModel
    Probit (probability unit) consequence model for fatality / injury fraction from a hazard dose.
    ToxicLibrary.Thresholds
    Toxic-exposure threshold record for a chemical.
